name: Western Union
description_short: Kansas City, MO's Western Union at 3800 Broadway Blvd offers money transfer and check-cashing services with extended weekday hours.
description_long:
Western Union's Kansas City location stands at 3800 Broadway Blvd, a standalone service center on Kansas City, MO's Broadway corridor. The branch operates Monday through Friday from 9AM to 7PM and Saturday 10AM to 6PM (closed Sundays), making it accessible for weekday morning and evening stops or weekend morning visits for residents across the Kansas City area.

This 3800 Broadway location provides standard Western Union money transfer services, including domestic and international wire transfers, bill payment options, and check cashing. To use the service, call +1 816-471-2274 to confirm current offerings or discuss your specific transfer needs with the Kansas City staff.

If you're sending money abroad or need fast cash from a check in Kansas City, this Broadway Blvd branch is a practical choice. Bring a government-issued ID and your payment details or check. Western Union specializes in fast money transfers for Kansas City residents who need international payment options.
pros: Extensive agent network across US with locations in Walmart, grocery chains, banks, and retail stores for convenient access
Long operational history since 1851 provides credibility and established fraud prevention infrastructure
Offers both domestic and international money transfers with automatic currency conversion for recipients
Hybrid online-to-offline model allows customers to initiate transfers online or via app and pay cash in-store to save time
Multiple service options including bill payments, money orders, cash pickup, and prepaid card delivery
Money Transfer Control Number (MTCN) tracking system enables transparency and confirms fund arrival timing
No minimum balance or credit check required for prepaid card receipt option
cons: Fees and exchange rates are not transparent upfront on the main website; pricing varies significantly by method and destination
Does not provide in-person currency exchange services, limiting value for international travelers
Operating hours vary by agent location with no unified schedule, creating potential inconvenience
In-person transactions may cost more than online-only alternatives, though pricing calculator is available
Service depends on partner locations' availability and operational status; agent network limitations affect accessibility in rural areas
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked consumers who need cash-based money transfer and bill payment services
International remittance senders and recipients who need funds delivered in local currency
Customers without smartphone access or digital banking who rely on in-person financial services
Individuals sending emergency funds domestically who need same-day or rapid transfer capability
diagnosis: Western Union is best for cash-based consumers, international remittance senders/recipients, and unbanked individuals who need reliable in-person money transfer and bill payment services. The main caveat is that pricing is variable and often higher than digital alternatives, and the service depends on partner location availability rather than dedicated storefronts.
services: In-person domestic money transfers at agent locations
International money transfers with currency conversion
Bill payment services (utilities, rent, car payments) at participating locations
Cash pickup for funds sent via MTCN
Western Union Prepaid Visa Card for receiving money
Online transfer initiation with in-store cash payment
Retail and grocery store agent location network
Walmart-specific money transfer and cash pickup services
meta_description: Western Union at 3800 Broadway Blvd, Kansas City, MO. Fast money transfers and check cashing with convenient hours.
